title: mandevilla oaxacana
intro: Mandevilla oaxacana, also known as the Mexican mandevilla, is a tropical flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Mandevilla oaxacana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Mandevilla oaxacana can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant material in a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
